data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for version control and change tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the version control and change tracking feature, but the provided evidence does not include any specific information or functionality that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for version control and change tracking, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that these features are implemented or operational. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of version control and change tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the version control and change tracking requirement.
